rule_text: DTP emails alternate section backgrounds in a fixed rhythm: purple hero image → white content section (efficacy + side-effect bullets) → white or light photo section (patient story / lifestyle) → green accent panel (#01A47E, affordability or symptom-icon trio) → purple campaign image section ('BECAUSE IBSRELA CAN' lockup) → locked End Matter.
intent: Keep DTP email section backgrounds in a recognizable, consistent brand rhythm.
summary: DTP emails alternate backgrounds: purple hero → white content (efficacy + side-effects) → white/light photo (story/lifestyle) → green #01A47E accent panel → purple campaign image → locked End Matter.
